all_games.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates shut down the Chicago Cubs with a strong pitching performance from Shota Imanaga, who struck out nine batters in six innings. Bryan Reynolds' home run proved to be the difference-maker for the Pirates.
The Arizona Diamondbacks edged out the Philadelphia Phillies in a back-and-forth game. Brandon Marsh's home run proved to be the difference-maker for the Diamondbacks.

The Detroit Tigers shut down the Miami Marlins with a strong pitching performance from Keider Montero, who struck out seven batters in six innings. Javier Báez' home run proved to be the only offense for the Tigers.
The Los Angeles Angels exploded for 10 runs in a blowout win over the Cincinnati Reds. Jorge Soler's home run and four RBIs led the Angels' offense.
The Toronto Blue Jays' offense exploded for 10 runs in a blowout win over the Minnesota Twins. Ryan Jeffers' home run and three RBIs led the Twins' offense.
The Athletics shut down the New York Mets with a strong team effort. Jacob Wilson had three hits for the Athletics.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
all_games.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays edged out the New York Yankees in a close game. Yandy Díaz' home run and two RBIs proved to be the difference-maker for the Rays.
The San Francisco Giants edged out the Baltimore Orioles in a close game. Willy Adames' home run and two RBIs proved to be the difference-maker for the Giants.

all_games.top_batting_line: Ronald Acuña Jr.: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves exploded for 11 runs in a blowout win over the Cleveland Guardians. Ronald Acuña Jr.'s home run and two RBIs led the Braves' offense.

all_games.game: Chicago White Sox @ Kansas City Royals
all_games.summary: The Kansas City Royals shut down the Chicago White Sox with a strong pitching performance from Kris Bubic, who struck out 11 batters in seven innings. Carter Jensen's home run proved to be the only offense for the White Sox.
The Washington Nationals edged out the Milwaukee Brewers in a close game. Jake Bauers' home run and three RBIs proved to be the difference-maker for the Nationals.

all_games.game: Boston Red Sox @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals edged out the Boston Red Sox in a close game. Connelly Early's strong pitching performance proved to be the difference-maker for the Cardinals.
The San Diego Padres edged out the Colorado Rockies in a close game. Gavin Sheets' two home runs and four RBIs proved to be the difference-maker for the Rockies.
The Seattle Mariners exploded for nine runs in a blowout win over the Houston Astros. Yordan Alvarez' home run and three RBIs led the Astros' offense.
The Los Angeles Dodgers edged out the Texas Rangers in a close game. Corey Seager's home run and three RBIs proved to be the difference-maker for the Dodgers.
